case_title: SARGENT, KOJO VS MARTIN LUTHER KING MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE APTS., INC et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-26-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-30-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR PLAINTIFF TO SERVE TALIAFARO INC AND TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.
